records.ety: [L. enormitas, fr. enormis enormous: cf. F. normit. See Enormous.]

defs: The state or quality of exceeding a measure or rule, or of being immoderate, monstrous, or outrageous.
quotes: The enormity of his learned acquisitions.

defs: That which is enormous; especially, an exceeding offense against order, right, or decency; an atrocious crime; flagitious villainy; an atrocity.
quotes: These clamorous enormities which are grown too big and strong for law or shame.
